anyOf.description: Manually emits a particle on an emitter of "effect" type at the event location, creating the emitter if it doesn't already exist (be sure to use "minecraft:emitter_rate_manual" for the spawned emitter effect).
Does the same as particle except the new particle will inherit the spawning particle's velocity.
Create an emitter of "effect" type at the event's world position, in a fire-and-forget way.
The emitter will be bound to the same actor/locator.

randomize.description: When using random, one element will be picked from the array based on the weight.

sequence.description: When sequence is specified, that array will execute in order, with every element executing when the event fires.

sound_effect.description: Sound effects specify the specific "level sound event" to be played when the event fires.
